title: Gravy Chicken Thighs
ingredients: 1.25kg bone in, skin on chicken thighs / drumsticks
method: Mix dry seasonings (paprika, thyme, onion powder, salt, pepper) in a bowl
Place chicken skin side up in a baking pan. Oil up the meat, then rub seasonings on the skin
Whisk flour with a small amount of stock until lump free, then whisk in remaining stock. Pour in pan around the chicken
Bake uncovered for 50 mins, or until chicken is crispy and golden
Remove chicken and whisk gravy to make it smooth
notes: For a gluten free option, use cornflour instead of flour
